top_signals.title: Senate backs Iran war powers resolution as GOP pressure grows on Trump's deal to end war
top_signals.summary: Senate Republicans want more details on Trump’s Iran deal as questions swirl around sanctions relief, nuclear restrictions and congressional approval.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. jet fuel production rises after prices doubled in March
top_signals.summary: Weekly estimates suggest U.S. jet fuel production has increased to record highs in response to elevated jet fuel prices after the Strait of Hormuz closed on February 28. Higher crude oil prices and supply concerns, particularly in Europe and Asia, which previously imported much of their jet fuel supply from the Persian Gulf, have driven up jet fuel prices. Much of the increased U.S. jet fuel production is being exported, as domestic inventories remain above average.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: ‘More complicated, more restrictive’: Treasury confirms scrapping of Lifetime ISA but industry questions remain
top_signals.summary: The government has confirmed it is replacing the hotly debated Lifetime ISA with a new product aimed solely at first time buyers, but industry figures are questioning the new framework. In a consultation published on Tuesday, the government confirmed the new product, dubbed the ‘First Time Buyer ISA’, (FTB ISA)  will only be available to [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: South Korea Delays Single-Stock Weekly Options Days Before Start
top_signals.summary: South Korea has delayed a plan to launch weekly single-stock options on shares including SK Hynix Inc. and Samsung Electronics Co., the latest sign regulators are becoming jittery after wild stock-market swings.

top_signals.summary: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India Cuts Coal Imports as Power Plants Turn to Domestic Fuel
top_signals.summary: India is boosting the share of domestic coal used in power plants designated to run on imported fuel, as rising local coal production and expanding renewables have helped to cut coal imports to multi-year lows. India has raised the use of domestic coal to 50% at many power plants that have typically run on imported coal, industry and government officials told Reuters on Wednesday. Power producers are currently running the coal-fired power plants on a mix of imported and domestic coal, and some plants have hit a 70% share of domestic coal, according…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Higher blending targets drive RIN prices close to record highs
top_signals.summary: Compliance credits for biomass-based diesel and ethanol have doubled in value since the start of this year. The credits, known as renewable identification numbers (RINs), have increased in price, mostly because of higher U.S. biofuel blending targets. The combination of high RIN prices and rising motor gasoline and diesel fuel prices has created an especially favorable market for producing and blending biofuels.

top_signals.title: Compromise kids online safety bill unveiled by House leaders, with key omission
top_signals.summary: The so-called duty of care provision that was excluded would have mandated that online platforms take reasonable measures to prevent specific harms such as suicidal ideation, eating disorders and cyberbullying by changing algorithm and design features.
